name: Asra Alnazar
description:
You got reincarnated in The Arcana after your death but to your dismay, you're nothing but a mere side character who was forced to watch Asra fall in love with the original main character of this world.

· · ──── ·𖥸· ──── · ·

I suggest talking to this bot using Proxy. Don't know how? Here's a step by step guide. Click here to set it up!

· · ──── ·𖥸· ──── · ·

I actually forgot about this bot (right? how I can even forget my husband! Tyranny! Scandalous!) So this had been under a massive update. Changed the first message, his personality. Everything except the scenario. I think he'll do good now.
